race.comment: ANNABELLE SUNSHINE (5) is an 11-start maiden who finished fourth, beaten 4 lengths, when resuming from a spell last start over 1300m at Seymour. Will take a lot from that hit-out and looks a strong chance to break through in what isn't the strongest race ever run. GYPSY MOON (9) showed good early dash last start and held on well to finish 4 lengths back in third over 1200m at Cranbourne. Hard to beat in this suitable contest. BOLSHIE (2) is hard to tip with any confidence given he has placed just once from 21 starts, but the recent assignments have been tougher than this so he gets his best chance in a while to be a key player. DOWNTHERABBITHOLE (6) failed to figure again last time over 1600m at Moe, beaten 9 lengths into eighth, but is better suited here and in well after the claim.
